_comment: Hand-curated open TODOs / blockers. Edit freely. The dashboard reads this and shows it on the system-map card.

items.title: News Dashboard cron requires Docker
items.detail: OpenClaw cron daemon spawns the agentTurn inside a Docker sandbox. If Docker is down at 07:30 IL, the morning delivery is missed. Doctor now flags this; longer-term consider a non-sandbox cron kind or Windows Task Scheduler.

items.title: Google Photos broad-readonly scope deprecated
items.detail: As of 2025-03-31, broad photoslibrary.readonly only returns app-created data. Real library scan requires Picker API integration (separate UX). Current scan is auth-clean but returns 0 items.

items.title: Organizer cron disabled (replacement payload not enabled)
items.detail: organizer-v2-continuation cron remains disabled after the docker-loop incident. organizer/cron-payload.proposed.json is documented but not applied. Re-enable after a few stable manual tick.ps1 runs.

items.title: 39 large user files awaiting manual review
items.detail: Computer scan flagged 39 files >=200MB (drone footage, movies, etc.). They sit in the manualReview bucket and require explicit -ApproveAll all to enter the approval package.

items.title: Third-party skills triage deferred
items.detail: Audit recommended archiving devops-automation-pack, systems-architect, the broken third-party workspace-files (replaced by _custom/workspace-files-win); choosing between gws-gmail and google-workspace-mcp. Not done yet.
